name: medical office coordinators in dental offices processing 10–20 appointments/week tool
description: For medical office coordinators in dental offices processing 10–20 appointments/week, inconsistent patient follow-up causes missed appointments. We automate recall notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.

problem_solved: Inconsistent patient follow-up leading to missed appointments.
